title: DedupCheckResult
description: Structured output of the skill deduplication guard (FEATURE-002). Produced by skill-authoring Step 0 for `create` and `gap_seed` operations. Consumed by Step 9 origin_metadata population.

status.description: DEDUP_CLEAR if no match above threshold; DEDUP_HIT if similarity >= 0.75 for at least one candidate.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the dedup check was performed.

matches.description: Top 3 matching skills (present only when status = DEDUP_HIT). Sorted by similarity_score DESC.

overlapping_triggers.description: Trigger phrases that appear in both the proposed and candidate skill.

override_approved.description: True when status = DEDUP_HIT and the author chose Option B (proceed despite duplicate).

override_reason.description: Author's justification for proceeding despite a DEDUP_HIT. Null when override_approved = false.
